title: Is it rated?
input: You will be given the name of the past contest held at Codeforces within a single line.
output:
Print 1 if the contest was rated, 0 else.

Semi-rated contest(s?) like https://codeforces.com/blog/entry/56101 will be considered as a rated contest.
source: Contest, BOJ User Contest, 구데기컵, 진짜 구데기컵 2018, veydpz
